'''鈭歞h-k-y-f''' ('''kadhakyefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vax|vax]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vax|vax]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-k-y-f
|-
! Lemma
| kadhakyefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhakyefoko|thidhakyefoko]] || [[word:jidhakyefoko|jidhakyefoko]] || [[word:shidhakyefoko|shidhakyefoko]] || [[word:kidhakyefoko|kidhakyefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhakyefoko|thodhakyefoko]] || [[word:jodhakyefoko|jodhakyefoko]] || [[word:shodhakyefoko|shodhakyefoko]] || [[word:kodhakyefoko|kodhakyefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhakyefoko|thodhakyefoko]] || [[word:jodhakyefoko|jodhakyefoko]] || [[word:shodhakyefoko|shodhakyefoko]] || [[word:kodhakyefoko|kodhakyefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhakyefoko|th忙dhakyefoko]] || [[word:j忙dhakyefoko|j忙dhakyefoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhakyefoko|sh忙dhakyefoko]] || [[word:k忙dhakyefoko|k忙dhakyefoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhakyefoko|thadhakyefoko]] || [[word:jadhakyefoko|jadhakyefoko]] || [[word:shadhakyefoko|shadhakyefoko]] || [[word:kadhakyefoko|kadhakyefoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
